reviews.review_title: Great experience, just need more spaces
reviews.review_description: LOVE this game and the concept. Always wanted to build an arcade like this is VR so this is a dream come true! Great game selection and I love the multiplayer. My ONLY complaint is that you don’t get many spaces to use to place items. Half of my arcade is empty because I’ve already maxed out the item space limit. Big let down, because I had big ideas for my arcade that I can’t even begin because of this restriction. If this was fixed then it’d be an immediate 5 stars. I would also like to see more games being put in in the future, but the space issue needs to be addressed before any further updates. Other than that I love this game SO much and would highly recommend!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the incredible feedback and kind words! We're absolutely thrilled that Arcade Online has been a dream come true for you—building your own arcade is something special, and we love that you're so passionate about it.

We hear you on the item space limit and truly appreciate you sharing how it's impacted your vision. That's valuable insight for us as we continue to think about the future of the game. While we don't have any immediate updates to announce, we always appreciate feedback from our community.

Thanks again for the recommendation and for taking the time to leave your review!

reviews.review_description: Love this game!!!!

developer_response.body: Awesome to hear!  Thank you so much for taking the time to leave your comment and review.  We're thrilled to hear you're loving the game!

reviews.review_description: This is amazing the addons are brilliant im well looking forward to maby getting another room and more games might be a lot to ask you lovey people but woow me and my buddys well enjoy playing this ive loved making my own arcade please keep adding more stuff ill be first to buy it :) aha needs an update seems to be a little dead theses days

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for this enthusiastic and supportive review! We’re absolutely thrilled that you and your friends are enjoying building your own arcade.

We hear you on wanting more content and appreciate the feedback. While we don’t have a specific update to announce right now, we’re always listening to our community. 

Thanks again for the kind words and for being part of our community!

reviews.review_description: I got all of my friends to buy this a while back, they stopped playing, but we are ready to buy new games for our arcades, haven't seen an update in over a year. Is the game abandoned?

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your loyalty and for bringing your friends into the game—that's awesome to hear.

We're still here and actively listening to our community. While we don’t have any immediate plans for updates to Arcade Legend, we truly appreciate you taking the time to share your thoughts. We hope you continue to enjoy building and running your arcades!

reviews.review_description: I want more people active in public servers cause it’s so boring playing by myself and no one barely plays. If you see this please make the game more popular. If you wanna play with me add me.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your support and feedback. We're really glad to hear you find the game worth it, and we appreciate you taking the time to share your thoughts!

We hear you on wanting to see more activity and more games. While we don’t have specific updates planned, our team always listens to our community and values feedback from our players.  Thank you!

reviews.review_description:
Due to hateful/abusive DMs I keep recieving from other users because of my reviews, im now editing my reviews to keep it short, 

I enjoyed this game, it was okay

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback, and we're genuinely sorry to hear about the DM abuse you’ve received from other users. That’s not what our community is about, and no one should have to edit their honest thoughts because of harassment.

Regardless, we’re glad you enjoyed the game, and we truly appreciate you taking the time to share your thoughts.

reviews.review_description: It's great, check it out.

developer_response.body: Thank you! We’re glad you’re enjoying it, and we really appreciate your endorsement!

reviews.review_description:
There was coin pushers, more claw machines, AR mode, carnival-style games, more attractions in the city, and more games and space.
Otherwise, a really good game! Would reccomend for a realistic(ish) arcade sim.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for taking the time to share your feedback! We really appreciate the suggestions — and we’re thrilled to hear you’re enjoying the game.

reviews.review_description: And I like it a lot! So far I don’t have much in my arcade yet but the games that I have played are so much fun and exciting. Can’t wait for light gun games and more driving arcade games that would be amazing!! 10/10 so far :)

developer_response.body: Thanks for sharing, we glad to hear you're loving it!  Make sure to go enjoy the axe throwing and retro arcade venues after (or before) building your own arcade!

reviews.review_description:
This is probably my favorite arcade  game its just that i hate no one is ever online or in a lobby so i never get to play with anyone but its  probably the best arcade game please add the 
 the handheld gun games like walking dead or  nerf please and thank you

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! It's rewarding to hear that we've created a game you like!  We don't have any immediate updates planned, but we always love hearing from players on ideas for future updates.  Thanks for taking the time to let us know!

reviews.review_description:
Multiplayer is SUPER buggy!! 
Very sad!!!!

A must have for any arcade lover!! I love this game but I hope there will be even more machines available soon!! My only complaint is the claw machines are kind of glitchy as is the multiplayer, I wish the multiplayer was a smoother experience, also it has been a long time since any updates, is there any news regarding that? I really love the game and hope for its continued growth!!

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the kind words — we're thrilled to hear how much you're enjoying Arcade Legend! We understand the excitement for more machines and smoother multiplayer, and we really appreciate you taking the time to share your thoughts.

While we don’t have any news to share at the moment, we're grateful for your support and love hearing how much the game means to arcade fans like you. Thanks again for your support and taking time to leave your review!

reviews.review_description: So I purchased this game and had just started playing it. But the instructions on what to do aren’t very good. So I quit playing it for a few days and tried to go play again but couldn’t get it to work, so I hit new game. Took me back to very beginning and now it won’t work at all. So purchase a game I can’t play at all just a waste of money.

developer_response.body: Thank you for leaving your feedback, and we're sorry the game left you feeling disappointed.  We wonder if there might be a compatibility issue or a Quest headset updated needed.  What headset are you using?  If you wanted to send us an email to support@arcadelegendvr.com we'd love to help sort the problems out so you can enjoy playing games in your own arcade!

reviews.review_description:
Newest review update! You guys SERIOUSLY outdid yallselves!! Like alll the game mechanics and ALL the prizes in the store???? Your game is a staple in everything VR, bravo seriously games 🙏🏼 amazing work, I’veen playing this for almost 4 years now and I’m just blown away by the quality and amount of love that went into it, thank you!!










Congratulations on making it on a spot for top best social game for 2023! 



Positives: first of all, bravo, you guys took on the challenge of making the game and connecting with big brand arcade people as well but most of all actually making the games playable and all while having things like character customization and building customization, I love it and I’m ready for any updates

developer_response.body: We're thrilled we're still hitting the mark for you, enough to leave a review update!  Thanks for the love and support!

reviews.review_description: I played Arcade paradise and it has been the best. I figured no other game was out there that has its own original ROM cabinet arcade retro style games. With arcade paradise being very fun. This has its own appeal. Being able to explore the street, playing a fully stocked immediate arcade and building your own. I had no trouble spending my credits on this $25 game, I would of laid $50. It's a ten star game. Thank you for making your own legal ROM cabinets. Look forward to updates and other games from your company. Add more retro arcade cabinets please. Also th ability to play in ar mixed reality. Jesus loves you !

developer_response.body:
Thank you for this incredibly passionate and complimentary review! We're absolutely thrilled to hear how much you've enjoyed the retro arcade feel and the unique gameplay. Hearing that it's a 10-star game for you means the world to our team.

Thanks again for the amazing support—it’s players like you that make creating these games so rewarding.

reviews.review_description: This game is awesome! I love every game that they put into it. It feels like you are actually in an arcade. I am hopeful that there will be more for the future!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review and the feedback!  We're glad you're loving the game.  While we don't have any planned updates right now, we appreciate the support and hope you get a chance to play multiplayer so you can drop a stink bomb on a friend!

reviews.review_description: The piano game is one of my favorites! There are a lot of games to play and the ability to play with others is a wonderful addition. I'd love some more games and I'd like them to increase the number of games you can have in your arcade. I had my arcade structured how I wanted it but unfortunately I wasn't able to add the additional games I purchased because my arcade was full. It's amazing they added more to the prize store! Hopefully this game continues to make improvements. I'd love more customization options but I know this stuff takes time.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the thoughtful review! We're glad you're enjoying the piano game and the social play features—it's awesome to hear how you're structuring your arcade just the way you like it. We love hearing feedback like this, and while we can’t promise what’s coming next, we're always looking for ways to make the experience fun and rewarding. Thanks for being part of the community!

reviews.review_description: I love this game. I worked at an arcade, and it was the best job I ever had. But this game NEEDS more arcade games in it. There’s a ton of retro-style games, but I NEEEEED more modern arcade games in this. I’d also go nuts with joy if your games could breakdown and you have to fix them. Maybe little mini-games where you “fix” wiring or something like that? This concept COULD go so unbelievably far, and be the best VR game out there, if it was just deeper than it currently is.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the detailed feedback! We love hearing about your experiences and ideas—your passion for arcade games really shines through. While we can't commit to adding these features at this time, it’s awesome to know what you'd love to see. Keep sharing your thoughts; we’re always happy to hear from fellow arcade enthusiasts!

reviews.review_description: This game has a crazy amount of potential. On the surface, it's an arcade simulator! You can spin the wheel, play retro arcade games, and shoot some hoops! But underneath the surface, you realize it is so much more than that. It's a social environment! A place to hang out for people who don't have that option readily available in real life. Does your friend live in another country? Now you can go bowling together! Do you want to relax in an arcade environment? Take a seat and enjoy the ambiance! It has prizes, cosmetics, music, and more! With different options available, you can design your arcade how you want it! Over time, each arcade attraction you own makes your arcade money. You can use this money to purchase more arcade attractions! It's an amazing start to what could be one of the best games on the Meta store! However, unfortunately, the reality is that this game still needs more love and more time. I've sent my feedback to the devs via Discord. I hope they listen! The biggest issue is that in its current state, it lacks content. I can not, in good faith, recommend my friends, discord members, or people who watch my content to purchase this game yet. As of now, you can complete the entire game and get all that it has to offer within a few days. That wouldn't necessarily be a problem if you could find friends to take advantage of all the arcade activities. Meeting new people at the arcade is essential to keeping this game alive. But no one is online. The servers feel essentially dead. If you have the money, buy this game, and enjoy what they do have. Support the devs in Discord and urge them to do more with content. If you are cautious and have a budget, this game is not for you. It is not ready. But join the discord anyway and let them know what you want!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your comprehensive review and critical feedback of the game.  We appreciate your input, support, and taking the time to join our Discord to share your thoughts and speak to our development team in more detail!  We take all feedback seriously and truly appreciate the time and energy you took writing your review.  We hope we can live up to expectations.

reviews.review_description: This game is totally awesome. My favorite game is let bounce but there is one all-time favorite game that I really love ski ball and big bass wheel was the very first game I ever started playing when I was younger. I would rate this game a 10 out of 10. ￼

developer_response.body: Awesome, glad to hear you're loving it, thanks for the review!

reviews.review_description: My kids love this game. They done a great job on it. My only complaint is my boys wanted the skeeball add on. After I purchased it for them and they placed several skee ball machines in their arcade after closing app out and going back to it the skee ball machines disappear everytime. And we can’t seem to figure out how to resolve this issue.  Any help would be appreciated. Thanks.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great review and we're glad your kids love the game!  If you can send us an email to support@arcadelegendvr.com we'll help get the bug sorted out!

reviews.review_title: How do you unlock prize pack 2 ???? !!!!
reviews.review_description: Pleas someone help

developer_response.body: Please send us an email at support@arcadelegendvr.com so we can get some more information from you and help solve any issues you're having.

reviews.review_description: Absolutely love building my own arcade and having my friends over..It's awesome and there's alot of attention to detail and it's a good way to spend a Saturday night. Great job Dev's! Only thing missing that seems to be missing entirely throughout this and the entire quest library is an in game pinball selection that is multiplayer. I'm sure I'm not the only person that feels this way.

developer_response.body: Glad you're loving the game and hanging out with friends - that's exactly what we hoped for. Pinball is a classic arcade format, and you're not the only one to ask for it.  There are a few dedicated pinball games on Quest which do it really well, so we put our energy into other arcade genres where we felt there was a gap. Thanks for playing and for the awesome review!

reviews.review_description: This has to be the very best Arcade VR Game ever! You get straight into it and start having fun instantly! The games are amazingly done and extremely fun to play! 10/10 💖

developer_response.body: Thanks for the 5-star review!  We're glad to hear that the game met your expectations, we love hearing this!  Thanks for taking the time to let us know!

reviews.review_description: Why doesn't someone want to make an arcade that you can just play and enjoy? It can have progression and goals but not everyone wants (or has the time) to grind through a simulation of setting up an arcade from scratch just to get to play some games. It's not promoted as a simulation, deceptive.

developer_response.body: We're sorry that the game didn't meet your expectations.  You can actually go outside your venue (through the doors you entered) to visit other entertainment venues, including a full retro arcade and an axe throwing venue, where you can play a range of games immediately.  You can also visit other people's arcades to play in their fully built venues.  You can find other players to join in our Discord.  We hope you'll jump in and give it another try! Links to our Discord and social media are available at arcadelegendvr.com.

reviews.review_description: This is a great game but I wish there was an option that you could just unlock all the games.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the positive review!  The concept of the game developed from the direction of building and managing your own arcade, but we've discussed an option of a pre-built arcade.  For now,  you can join other public arcades and play in someone else's arcade that has unlocked everything, and the retro venue Arcade Galactic (located outside your arcade and down the alley) has all the retro games to play available immediately.  Join our Discord and find other players to jump into their arcade!

reviews.review_title: The New Update Made a Good Game GREAT!
reviews.review_description: Checked out the new Retro indie vr update and was meet with a truly fantastic arcade filled with 18 unique games from the Pico 8 virtual system. You can find the new arcade across the road from your own arcade next to the Axe Throwing. I also found out you can add these arcade games into your own already existing arcade. Super cool update and so much work has gone into this since it launched. Love it and highly recommend it for arcade game lovers new and old.

developer_response.body: Great to know that all our hard work had the right kind of impact! Thanks for the great review and support for the game!
We love the ASCII art in the review!  Thanks for letting us know how you feel about the game and thanks for playing!

reviews.review_description:
I’d really appreciate it if you marked this helpful thanks ;)

I have been looking for this game and when I discovered this game was released I was so happy. I had been going to arcades and this is the perfect game to play to show off your arcade skills to other people have those tickets roll in. It’s also officially licensed by LAI games which is the manufacturer of most arcade game. I got it for my friend(SimonSVG go check out his review) for his birthday so we can play together. 

LAI also says they have a lot more planned including premium attractions coming in 2023

100% MUST BUY :)



Type this code in your web browser to buy and mark helpful if you used :)


https://paw.wf/Arcade

developer_response.body: Hi LaGG_Jalapeno, thanks for your review! :) We're glad that you and Simon are having fun playing Arcade Legend together, we have new games launching in April and we can't wait to hear what you think!

reviews.review_description:
I have put a few into this so far and have really enjoyed it so far. 

I think some type of shooting gallery or “fingers crossed” a laser tag section to play with friends would be amazing. Also ski ball and air hockey would be very cool additions. 

Really looking forward to seeing where this game goes in future updates. 

Plus the music hits just right. It sounds like he used falcon 2 to compose it. I wish I knew how to submit music to you guys. 

One last feature I think would be nice is a sitting/standing option. 

Keep up the great work team!

*new edit
One thing I noticed which I can’t figure out is that everytime I try to use an unlocked bowling ball, it disappears and resets half way down the lane. Just wanted to make you aware of the issue.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review, we're happy you're enjoying Arcade Legend!  We appreciate the feedback on bowling. We would love it if you would jump in our Discord and share some footage of the issue so our dev team can help fix it. 

You can sit and play if you want, just hold down the A button to adjust for your height if you change positions.  And if you want to submit any music, we can't make any guarantees it will be integrated but you're more than welcome to submit to use through arcadelegendvr.com/support

reviews.review_description:
Really good interpretation of how a real arcade would look like. Use this link to get 25% off 
https://www.oculus.com/appreferrals/takipvp/4290234067753903/?utm_source=2

developer_response.body: Thanks for the positive review!

reviews.review_description:
Pros: Easy controls, You can customize your arcade, You can play the games which are a lot of fun, You can go bowling, and dress up your avatar

Cons: Not a lot of customization options with wallpapers or decorations all around, Not enough arcade games at all, bowling can be super buggy, income is super duper slow and seems to not get any faster no matter how much you level up


So, my thoughts are that I've actually put a good amount of time in the game. I really enjoy it and it is one of the first games I committed to purchasing on my oculus. I really think this game has a lot of potential if they added more content. (: But, so far it's really good! Recommend!

developer_response.body: Hi bxbyyluna! Thank you for the detailed review, and we're glad that you're having fun! We're also working on new content for the game, so please stay tuned! Bowling mechanics, as well as game economy/earning cash has been improved in our last update released yesterday. For income, the more arcade games you have in your arcade, the more cash you'll earn! Hope that helps :)

reviews.review_title: Great fun & cheaper than a real arcade!
reviews.review_description:
25% off code available at the bottom of the review!
-----
This is a great game for arcade lovers out there wanting that experience in the comfort of their own home. Plus it's cheaper than visiting an arcade in real life! For clarification, I do have the added benefit of playing this with my partner, and the social aspect adds to the experience - in my opinion anyway.  The fact I have friendly competition means I'm wanting to go back and play more of each game to try and beat highscores. Because of this, I don't know how entertaining this game would be for a solo player.

As other reviews have mentioned, you do have to work your way through the game in order to unlock all the arcade games; however I enjoy this as it could have the potential to get boring with them all unlocked from the get-go. But I do also enjoy some sort of progression in games. 

The ability to customise your own arcades is a lovely touch. It makes the space certainly feel more personalised - even if the options are limited to walls and floors. You can also visit each others arcades which adds to the social element. 

The physics in this are great also. As there are a few different types of arcade games available, I was pleasantly surprised at how well they've simulated the different "feels" between these. 

Not only this, but the development team are actively reading and replying to reviews, taking on criticisms, and are still updating the game. This bodes well for the future of this title being even more entertaining than it already is. I really do look forward to seeing what other titles they add to the list of available arcade games. 

Some improvements I would like to see are: 
- Local leaderboards. The leaderboard currently only show the global scores. It would be nice to have high scores related to your own arcade or amongst your friends. This might add a bit more replayability due to wanting to beat your friends scores - for bragging rights of course. 

- More games. I think this goes without saying really as it's something the devs have acknowledged already. However it would be an incomplete review without mentioning it. 

- Slight bug fixes when visiting others arcades. Bowling balls flying out the back of the ball machine when trying to play a game together is one. AI playing the game you're currently playing is another (seems to still happen to visitors, not so much the owner of the arcade). However I've not come across any game breaking ones thus far. 

- Further arcade customisation/decoration and arcade game/furniture space. 

- Tutorials on how to link machines with Versus modes on them like the basketball game. Although, I could just be an airhead and overlooked where this is. 

In short, I really do enjoy this game currently and look forward to the future of it. When the dev team add more games, it will make it a must have for the quest gaming experience. 

If you're still a little unsure, have this link (remove the 3 spaces) for 25% off the purchase of this title and try it for yourself: 

https://www.oculus. com/ appreferrals/AFeralUnicorn/ 4290234067753903

Thank you for reading, and happy gaming!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the comprehensive review and glad you're enjoying the game!  There are some great suggestions in your feedback and we're already working on our next round of bug fixes and optimizations along with new games we're preparing to release!  Please feel free to join our Discord to meet other players and explore more arcades or follow our updates on social media - links to everything available at arcadelegendvr.com.

reviews.review_description:
I've played this game for a few days to unlock all the games. And this is the most fair arcade I've played at. None of the games seemed rigged, or set to take your tokens. You get tokens to play just by looking around the ground. Each game also can be played without tokens, so you don't have to worry about running out. I also like the comfort options, so you can move around without getting nauseous. It would also be fun to get a group of friends to see your work, and play together. I do wish there was more of a way to meet people in game. But I understand wanting to play privately.
The developers have mentioned that there are more types of games coming. I hope that they stick with this, because I can see this to become something really special, a cool place for friends to hang around and have fun together.

developer_response.body: Hi Foxclouds! To quote one of the reviewers, our Discord community is very friendly and welcoming, so feel free to join us and make friends! :D https://discord.gg/XnevCnq6dN. And yes, we definitely have plans to add more attractions and arcade games, stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: I absolutely love this game! You get to build your own Arcade, complete tasks, unlock REAL arcade machines and play with it!

developer_response.body: Hi Speedy.76, thank you for the review! We're glad you had fun playing Arcade Legend :)

reviews.review_description:
🔷🔹25% OFF CODE🔹🔷
‼️REMOVE SPACE IN BETWEEN “. com”‼️

https://www.oculus. com/appreferrals/JujuGamerHaha/4290234067753903/?utm_source=2

🌀REVIEW🌀

In this game you can build and customize your own arcade center! You can customize just like the ones you see in real life! And best of all you can play the arcade games after building them! You can unleash your inner designer and put your designs to the test! Making your dream arcade center!

Overall good game!

developer_response.body: We're glad you're enjoying the game and we appreciate the support!  Thanks for playing!

reviews.review_description:
Hello! I found this game really fun and addictive, and I completed it as fast as possible, I have some suggestions and I also have noticed a few bugs.

BUGS

1. When claiming bar money, the timer stops at 0:00:00 and isn't claimable until you restart the game.
2. When playing the prize grabber machine if you move the joystick while pressing ok after putting in multiple credits, it will use up a credit without letting you play the game.
3. Weird stretching of the hands when waving them around.
4. When turning snap to turn on it stretches the world like it stretches the hand
5. When putting your hand above your head and pulling down, it will be stuck above your head while your real life hand is below your head
6. Hard to grab small objects
7. The line to grab coins has a very specific area to be able to grab it

RECOMMENDATIONS

1. Being able to make your room public, a chance for better social implementation
2. Roof Customization
3. More hairstyles like messy hair, middle part, wolf cut, etc.
4. More tools to use
5. NPCS having stuff to throw away, will throw on ground if there is no trash cans, this gives more uses for the cleaning tool and also gives reason to use trash cans in furniture
6. A restaurant section where you earn revenue from NPCS and complete orders for them
7. A hiring system for the bar and hypothetical restaurant

Again, this game is amazing and I can tell alot of work and passion went into this project and it definitely payed off, can't wait for updates.

developer_response.body: Hi oricharter! Thank you for collating the bugs for us and for the detailed recommendations :) We'll continue to work on and improve the game, stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: Ok, here it is, the game itself is graphically sound, and the limited amount of games are good and some just ok and quite boring ie the colour match game for me, the bowling is good enough and the ball games are good and enjoyable, but here's the down side, there isn't nearly enough games to play, I have "sold out" on all games available (only 7 available but to buy multiple times) and then after you have "sold out" on the games, you can't fit them all in your arcade as it says "not enough space available" even though there is plenty of room left in the arcade and it actually looks half done, once you've ran out of space, you can't extend your area and you can't even do/place stuff like sofas, tables, bins etc, so I have an arcade that looks like I've copped out half way through, a bar area that's as empty and looks like I just couldn't be bothered with it and a bowling area that also looks pretty naked, personally I would have put the stacker and grab machine down in the bowling area and some tables and chairs in the bar area, but if you have all the games then you can't do this, all because it says "you are out of space" which I have an abundance of. To manoeuvre the games around the arcade could also been a little easier and it's way to fiddly and messy to get things into place. You have a Duke box that isn't worth a toffee as the music is shocking to say the least, and limited is an understatement. But to make the game better you need the restrictions on the area available lifted and you seriously need more games to play, even if it just games that kids love ie whack a mole, coin dozer, squirty duck game, hoop throwing game, a ball throwing game where you knock targets down ie here in the UK you have a game where you throw balls at rows of clowns and knock them over. This game has so much potential but right now as it stands I would say save your money and wait for updates and the game to be worth buying because there are better games out there that are more engaging for less money... Gutted I paid £19 for this and it's only half a game that I have technically finished just outside the time for you to be able to get a refund because I would have done,  this game has so much potential but the developers have seriously let themselves down 😞

developer_response.body:
Update (March 13, 2024)
We're following up on some older reviews to make sure people who felt there wasn't enough content in the game are aware of our free update!  We just opened another venue with 18 retro arcade games, licensed from independent developers.  Go check it out, and if you feel it worthy of an updated review from your side, we'd greatly appreciate it! Thanks for playing!

--------

Hi dean.armstrong1, thank you for your feedback! We're working on optimizing the games so that you'll be able to include more of them in your arcade, and the dev team is also hard at work on our next update. We've also received a lot of comments about the move tool, and we'll definitely take them into consideration. The Arcade Legend team is a very small one, and we seek your patience and understanding while we continue to work on the game!

reviews.review_description:
I'm not good at writing reviews but this games feels like your inside of Dave and busters only thing I don't like is that you have to have tickets for the games
Edit: thanks for the response devs that is what I meant and now I'm playing tons more :)

developer_response.body: Hi Choobtub! Not sure if this is what you meant, but there's a free play mode for all our arcade games! Just pull the yellow toggle on the side of the side of the card reader towards you, that way you don't have to insert tokens before playing. Do take note that you won't earn tickets in free play mode, but you'll still earn XP! :)

reviews.review_description: Giving 5 stars because I know the devs are actively working on this game and the potential of this game is huge! Yes only limited amount of games avaliable at the moment but can't wait for more to come out. Had one issue with the Jukebox no longer playing music even though the record is spinning. It also would be awesome to be able to sit on the furniture you put out and the tables at the bar. Also would be cool to unlock black lights for the bowling alley and the glow wallpaper to go along with it!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review and great ideas Chris!  You're right, we do have more games coming soon!  We'll check the jukebox issue out.   When you've played through all the tracks you've collected it does not auto-restart, but yeah it would make sense for the record to stop spinning. If you're not already a member of our Discord please jump in, the community keeps growing and it's a great place to find other players to connect with.

reviews.review_description:
I love really good tycoon games and this doesn’t prove me wrong! I love how you can put your games in your own spot, also to play them too. My only concerns are that there isn’t enough games to unlock. Another thing is moving the games with the move tool I wish you could move it with a joystick. Lastly, I can take some grind but I wish you could generate more money so you don’t have to wait an hour for 1 game.

P.S. when I try to collect an item using tickets 
the quest won’t count it. Yes, there may be some bugs here and there, but if they aren’t game destroying, I can deal with it. (Also, it’s way more fun to experience the game with friends)


Thank you for your time 😀

developer_response.body: Hi bamilton! Thank you for your feedback, and not to worry - we have more games and attractions planned :) Our next update will focus on optimizations, game economy improvements and bug fixes. Please stay tuned!
